as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bnh2_R8vrWYGrMmANWsB-12" value="<div><b>Calculate invoice slots&nbsp;</b></div><div><br></div>How many invoices should be created depends on: billing group, price component , POD, customer and product.<div><br><div><br>should check in price component field "issued on a separate invoice" which invoice is marked, then check which billing groups include this POD .<br>and is "separate invoice for each pod" marked in this billing group. <br>if yes create separate invoice for this POD for marked invoice from price component. if no create invoice for whole billing group for marked invoice from price component.&nbsp;</div><div>should check if customer /product is different in different contract version then invoice slot should be splitted. (if customer version/product version is different - shouldn't split)&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Note: Invoice slotting logic should include all types of price components (e.g. one time, periodical) and if they have same invoice number configuration should be included in same invoice. <font color="#ff0000">If price component with application model Over time (contract&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">level</span><span style="background-color: initial;">) or Per piece should be invoiced in the same invoice (1-4) and there are more than one invoices for the invoice number 1-4 (if billing group &gt; 1) it should be included in slot which have the smallest invoice number</span></font></div></div><div><span style="color: rgb(255, 51, 153); background-color: initial;"><br></span></div><div><span style="color: rgb(255, 51, 153); background-color: initial;"><br></span></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry Billing data by scale validation rules</b><div><b><br></b></div><div>After normalizing billing data should check following conditions and if one of them is not covered should return an error for all invoice slots where this billing data was used:&nbsp;</div><div>1. <b>Period from</b>/<b>Period to</b> dates for all <font style="color: rgb(51, 51, 255);">overlapping</font> scale code sub periods codes should fill full header&nbsp;</font></span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">2. Gaps shouldn't exist for scale codes</span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">3. Tariff period should cover whole scale codes sub-period (one or more), else error.</span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;">4. <font style="color: rgb(51, 51, 255);">This must be checked if there is not correction for this sub period </font>for scale code sub periods check total volumes should be equal to (<b>difference*multiplier)+correction-deduction</b></span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;"><br></span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;"><br></span></div><div>see examples:&nbsp;<a href="https://asterbit.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Phoenix/pages/211386385/Billing+data+by+scales+validation+examples">Billing data by scales validation examples</a></div>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;rounded=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-4090" y="-150.95" width="355" height="239.44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bnh2_R8vrWYGrMmANWsB-283" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" parent="1" source="bnh2_R8vrWYGrMmANWsB-206" target="bnh2_R8vrWYGrMmANWsB-282" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bnh2_R8vrWYGrMmANWsB-284" value="Error for invoice slot.&nbsp; formulas.&nbsp;</span></div><div><b>By number of days&nbsp; - checked&nbsp;</b><span style="background-color: initial;"></span></div><div><p style="margin:0in;font-family:Calibri;font-size:11.0pt">New volume for each interval =<br>(tariff scale volume /number of days in tariff scale period)* number of days for each<br>splitted period</p></div><div><b>By number of days - not Additionally should be checked for each billing group at&nbsp;<br>least one POD should be activated in billing group for the respective billing run<br><span style="color: rgb(255, 0, 0);">invoice&nbsp;</span>date; if not -&nbsp; do not create interim for this billing group<br><br>2. color="#ff0000">for volumes <strike>invoice </strike></font>- can be taken from&nbsp;<span style="background-color: initial;">latest invoice and from&nbsp;<br> draft (only from current billing run)</span><br><ul style="direction:ltr;unicode-bidi:embed;margin-top:0in;<br/> margin-bottom:0in" type="square"><li style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;vertical-align:middle"><span style="font-family:Calibri;font-size:11.0pt">if draft is not generated for interim group than should find the latest invoice by invoice number</span></li><li style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;vertical-align:middle"><span style="font-family:Calibri;font-size:11.0pt">should search invoice type=Standard, document type (debit, credit, invoice)&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></li></ul>if document type is invoice take value from invoice, if document type is debit or credit take value from consumption amount before deducting inteirm payments.&nbsp;<br><br>Filters to find latest(<font style="border-color: var(--border-color);">with biggest invoice number)&nbsp;</font>invoice for product contract: <br>Document type should be 'Invoice, debit or credit' and Invoice type should be 'Standard' and parameters which is included in interim group should be matched: billing group, POD(if exist), Invoice 1- invoice 4.<br><br>for <font color="#ff0000">invoice</font> date</li><li>Status: Draft</li><li>Document type: Invoice</li><li>Invoice Type: Inteirm and advance payment</li><li>Tax event date: defined in billing run</li><li>For each Vat rate group:</li><ol><li>Value excluding VAT: calculated in step 4</li><li>VAT amount</li><li>Value including VAT</li></ol><li>Total amount including VAT in default currency</li><li>Total amount including VAT in other currency</li><li>Invoice payment term: calculated value depending settings from contract or from interim object depending on setting; billing run&nbsp;<font color="#ff0000">invoice</font>&nbsp;date + Value</li><li>Number of income account: will be taken from product respective version of contract for billing run&nbsp;<font color="#ff0000">invoice</font>&nbsp;date&nbsp;</li><li>cost center/controlling order: will be taken from product respective version of contract for billing run&nbsp;<font contract, if not added from customer; Or value is fasle</li><ol><li>Bank</li><li>BIC</li><li>Bank account</li></ol><li>Period: calculated in step 5</li><li>Billing group (if product from</li><li>No interest on Overdue debt - <font color="#ff0000">if No interest on Overdue debt is checked should not take the Interest rate from the contract</font></li></ol>"
